recordTitle: Understanding check: tag-filter change — 5/6, one named gap
summary: Six evidence-grounded questions against the merged tag-filter change: five answered correctly; the unknown-tag fallback was missed and is recorded as a named gap with its evidence locations. Diagnostic only — never a merge gate.

decisions.rationale: Score 5/6; the unknown-tag fallback gap is real — I expected a blank list.

exampleWorking.reflection: I had the no-JS story right but assumed unknown tags would just blank the list — the empty state decision had not landed in my head.

canonicalBody:
# Understanding check — tag-filter change

Score 5/6. Named gap: unknown-tag fallback (expected a blank list; the
accepted behavior is the explain-and-suggest empty state, src/app.mjs:19).
Follow-up: re-read the STOP-01 resolution and the interface-directions
record. This check is diagnostic and never gates a merge.
